items.title: Visa Extends Everyday Payments Reach From China Remittances To U.S. Rentals
items.description: Visa (NYSE:V) has formed a new platform partnership with UnionPay International to support cross-border money movement into China using Visa Direct. The company has launched Visa & Main, a platform aimed at giving U.S. small businesses greater access to resources, partners and growth tools. Visa also announced a collaboration with Amenify to enable value-added resident commerce in the U.S. rental market using existing Visa cards. Visa shares recently closed at $325.58, with the stock...

items.title: How Visa’s $100M Small-Business Push and China Payout Expansion Will Impact Visa (V) Investors
items.description: In recent weeks, Visa has launched “Visa & Main,” a nationwide small-business platform that combines a US$100 million working capital facility with Lendistry, marketing support, and modern business tools to help entrepreneurs address funding gaps, customer reach, and digital adoption; it also expanded Visa Direct access into Chinese Mainland through a new agreement with UnionPay International. Together, these moves show Visa deepening its role as infrastructure for both small-business...

items.title: Mastercard's Value-Added Services Boom in 2025: Buy, Hold or Sell?
items.description: MA's value-added services drove strong growth in Q4 and 2025, but regulatory risks and growing competition cloud the outlook. Is MA a buy, hold or sell?

items.title: Could the digital euro get a green light in 2026?
items.description: The push for a digital euro has gained greater urgency as Europe seeks to bolster its financial sovereignty, with hopes the proposal will move forward this year after European lawmakers Tuesday backed the plans.There is renewed optimism that the European Parliament could really take that step this year after lawmakers on Tuesday expressed their support for the project.
